lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has a few minor scratches but no significant damage. The interior shows light wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and has been well-maintained.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant attention. The exterior has extensive rust, particularly around the wheel wells and undercarriage, and the paint is peeling in several areas. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a noticeable knock, and the transmission shifts roughly between gears. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn upholstery and a non-functional air conditioning system. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited for a parts car or a major restoration project.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior shows heavy wear and stains throughout. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs and is not currently reliable.

Looking for a rewarding project or a budget-friendly fixer-upper? This car is ready for someone with a vision! While it definitely needs significant mechanical and cosmetic TLC to get back to its best, it offers a great foundation for a mechanic or a DIY enthusiast. It's priced to sell and ready for its next chapter!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine is currently running roughly and exhibits signs of a possible head gasket leak, while the transmission has noticeable delays and slipping when shifting into higher gears. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, significant rust on the wheel wells, and heavily oxidized paint. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears, and several electronic components, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a dedicated project vehicle or a source for parts.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and value. This unit features a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile, ensuring a seamless driving experience for its next owner. Thoroughly inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking quality and performance.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure? This beauty is in wonderful shape and has been super well-maintained. It drives like a dream and is perfect for everything from daily commutes to fun weekend road trips. You're going to love how it feels on the road!

This BMW E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. It comes equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS rebuild and rear subframe reinforcement—critical for the chassis integrity of this platform. The suspension is upgraded with Bilstein B16 adjustable coilovers, enhancing lateral grip and damping response. Riding on lightweight Apex ARC-8 wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Routine maintenance complete.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and meticulous care, standing out as a prime example of its model year. The exterior paint retains a brilliant, deep shine, showing only the lightest evidence of careful road use, while the body panels remain straight and well-aligned. Step inside to find a smoke-free cabin where the premium upholstery has been preserved with high-quality conditioners, showing minimal wear and no tears. All interior electronics, including the navigation system, backup camera, and multi-zone climate control, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. It has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, with a recent oil change and a multi-point inspection already completed. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the brake pads were recently replaced for peace of mind. This is a turn-key vehicle ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which offers a premier balance of performance and long-term reliability. Subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, the automobile exhibits a high level of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. This unit represents a sophisticated acquisition for the professional seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist, balancing mechanical integrity with a refined aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a robust driving experience and consistent performance. Every system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure operational excellence, making this an ideal acquisition for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile without compromise.

Hey there! 👋 I'm looking for a new home for my trusty car. It’s been a fantastic ride and is still in really solid shape! It’s got a bit of character from our adventures together, but it’s super reliable and drives like a dream. Whether you’re heading to work or hitting the road for the weekend, this car is ready to go! I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have. Come say hi and take it for a test drive!

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L straight-six engine equipped with individual throttle bodies. This driver-focused example has had the critical rear subframe reinforcement completed and the VANOS system overhauled to ensure optimal torque delivery. It features a precise 6-speed manual transmission paired with a factory limited-slip differential. Performance is further sharpened by a set of Bilstein coilovers and refreshed bushings throughout the chassis, offering exceptional communicative feedback and cornering stability. A turn-key enthusiast machine with a solid service
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean interior. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a reliable, well-cared-for car that performs beautifully. The exterior maintains a high-gloss finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections typical of a well-loved vehicle. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. Inside, you'll find a clean, smoke-free interior with plush seating and a fully functional suite of modern amenities, including a responsive infotainment system and crisp climate control. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes are firm and responsive. This car offers a balanced driving experience—refined enough for the city, yet robust enough for long highway stretches. It is a solid, honest vehicle ready for its next chapter.

Power is delivered through a precise 6-speed manual transmission to a factory variable M differential lock. The chassis remains taut with updated bushings, while the individual throttle bodies provide the signature induction note and sharp throttle response enthusiasts demand. A well-maintained driver’s car that balances raw performance with mechanical integrity.
